About Legacy Irrigation

12+ years serving Sacramento and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Legacy Irrigation began with a simple mission: to help Sacramento homeowners maintain lush landscapes despite our challenging climate. What started as a two-person operation now serves thousands across the valley.

We take a soil-first approach, designing systems that account for Sacramento's clay expansion and summer heat stress. Every installation includes water-saving technology to meet California's strict conservation standards.

As active members of the Sacramento Watershed Program, we're committed to responsible water use that preserves our region's natural beauty for future generations.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Legacy Irrigation

Trusted irrigation professionals serving Sacramento, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
